gemini-3-pro_30-720_edit-rating-6-img.system_prompt: You are an expert CAD model evaluator.
gemini-3-pro_30-720_edit-rating-6-img.prompt:
Here is a video of an edit instruction, 6 images (front, back, left, right, top, bottom) of the original CAD model, and 6 images of the edited CAD model. Return a json with the following fields:
score-instruction-understanding: a score indicating how well the instruction has been understood and followed. 1 - Makes things worse or goes in completely the wrong direction. 2 - Does nothing. 3 - Makes an attempt, demonstrates a rough understanding of the request but many parts incorrect or incomplete. 4 - Mostly does what is asked, but with noticeable errors or omissions. 5 - Does what is asked, with small errors or omissions. 6 - Perfect - follows the request precisely with no errors or omissions. 7 - Above and beyond - perfect with helpful extras that a thoughtful expert designer would include. 
score-quality: a score indicating the quality of the work done.1 - No model or edit produced. 2 - Very poor - erroneous model, impossible geometry, overlapping geometries, incomplete sketches etc. 3 - Poor - simplistic, blocky. 4 - Average - acceptable first pass. 5 - Good attempt with room for improvement. 6 - High quality work, as you’d expect from an experienced designer. 7 - Perfect - extremely polished design.
Do not include any other text or formatting.
